prestazioni: Replace the stock **Koenigsegg 4.7L V8 (engine code: K47DET)** twin-supercharged setup with a **Precision Turbo & Engine PT6266 CEA (62mm, 88mm inducer) twin-turbo system**, featuring billet compressor wheels, 3.5-inch V-band inlets, and custom Koenigsegg-specific exhaust manifolds with Inconel 625 tubing to handle 2.2 bar (32 psi) of boost while retaining the factory 9.2:1 compression ratio. Pair with a **Motec M190 ECU** for full flex-fuel (E85) mapping, optimizing ignition timing and fuel delivery for 1,200+ hp at 8,200 RPM with a 9,000 RPM redline.

Upgrade the stock **Koenigsegg carbon-fiber driveshafts** with **Pankl Racing Systems 300M steel CV joints and tripod-style half-shafts**, designed to handle the increased torque (1,100+ Nm) while reducing rotational inertia by 18%. Replace the factory **Cima 6-speed transaxle** with a **Xtrac P1227 sequential gearbox** (used in LMP1 prototypes), featuring a magnesium case, paddle-shift actuation, and a 2.68:1 final drive ratio for improved acceleration without sacrificing top-speed gearing.

Swap the OEM **Koenigsegg carbon-ceramic brakes (392mm front, 362mm rear)** for a **Brembo GT-RS 920 monoblock caliper setup** with 420mm two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (front) and 380mm rotors (rear), paired with **Pagid RSL29 brake pads** for endurance racing. Install **Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed bleed), custom valving for the CCX’s double-wishbone suspension, and **Eibach ERS springs** (120 N/mm front, 110 N/mm rear) to reduce body roll by 30% while maintaining ride compliance.
estetica: Replace the stock **Koenigsegg dihedral synchro-helix door actuators** with **KW Automotive hydraulic struts** for faster door operation (0.8s open/close time) and install **Novitec Rosso carbon-fiber door sills** with integrated LED lighting that pulses in sync with the engine RPM. Add a **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 carbon-fiber front splitter** with a 3D-printed titanium support structure, designed to generate 180 kg of downforce at 250 km/h while reducing front-end lift by 45%.

Remove the factory **Koenigsegg ghost badges** and replace them with **HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x11 front, 21x13 rear)** in a **matt bronze finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35 R20 front, 345/30 R21 rear)** with custom Koenigsegg-branded sidewalls. Install **Aeromotions active rear wing** with dual carbon-fiber elements, adjustable via a **Motec PDM15** for dynamic angle changes (up to 15 degrees) based on speed, G-forces, and throttle position, generating 320 kg of rear downforce at 300 km/h.

Retrofit the **Koenigsegg CCX Edition’s carbon-fiber body** with a **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit**, modified to fit the CCX’s unique chassis dimensions, including **3D-scanned carbon-fiber overfenders** (50mm wider front, 70mm wider rear) and a **custom titanium exhaust exit system** (dual 100mm outlets) with **Akrapović titanium tips** and a **valved bypass for track/cruise modes**. Apply a **3M 1080 Matte Graphite vinyl wrap** with **PPF (Paint Protection Film) on high-impact zones** (front bumper, mirrors, rocker panels) and **ceramic coating (Gyeon Ceramic Quartz)** for UV resistance and hydrophobic properties.
